kept.text:
TSMC’s CoWoS is powerful not simply because capacity is tight, nor because Nvidia, AMD, Broadcom, Google, Amazon, and other AI chip customers are all fighting for allocation. 

The more important signal is this: CoWoS is rumored to have a value-added rate approaching 50%. That number matters because traditional electronics manufacturing usually operates with a value-added rate of roughly 15% to 25%. 

In other words, for every dollar of output, a large portion is passed through to raw materials, outsourced processes, labor, components, external services, and supply-chain costs. CoWoS follows a very different logic. If its value-added rate is truly close to 50%, then CoWoS is not merely a packaging service. It is a highly internalized, process-driven, capital-intensive, and technology-closed manufacturing platform. This is not just high margin. It is structural proof that profit is being locked inside TSMC’s internal ecosystem.

$TSM 

 https://t.co/LxlFt2V5MN

kept.text:
DRAM ETF'i yayınlayan Roundhill Investments 11 şirketi barındaracak yeni bir ETF başvurusu yaptı. 

Mevcut Magnificent 7'yi biliyorsunuz, Google Amazon Apple Meta Microsoft Nvidia Tesla. Bu ETF onlara ek olarak Broadcom,Anthropic, OpenAI ve SpaceX'i de dahil ediyor.

İçerisinde Anthropic, OpenAI ve SpaceX'i barındıran ilk etf başvurusu olması nedeniyle bence oldukça fırsat barındırabilecek bir ETF. Çıkış tarihi ve hisselerin fon içerisindeki dağılımı şu an için belirsiz detaylar geldikçe güncelleyeceğim.
